basics.name: Yuvraj Singh
basics.label: AI Engineer & Cybersecurity Specialist
basics.summary: AI Engineer specialising in cybersecurity applications, with hands-on experience in SOC operations and ML-based system development. Worked at Noida Power Company Limited monitoring security logs, supporting incident response, and contributing to vulnerability and patch management. Currently pursuing MSc in Artificial Intelligence at National College of Ireland.

bullets: Monitored and analysed security logs using SIEM tools (Splunk/ELK) to identify potential threats in real time
Investigated security incidents and supported incident response — alert validation, escalation, and triage
Conducted vulnerability assessments and coordinated patch management to improve system security posture
Collaborated with internal teams to strengthen security monitoring and reduce incident response time
Assisted the Information Security Division with routine monitoring activities and internal coordination
Gained exposure to security tools, advisory handling processes, and basic infrastructure support
Worked across teams in a 24×7 SOC setup, contributing to documentation, user activity reviews, and technical assessments

projects.title: Destiny AI
projects.subtitle: Offline Desktop Assistant
projects.desc: Offline AI-powered desktop assistant with real-time voice command execution. Privacy-focused — zero cloud dependency. Built with a cinematic PyQt6 interface.

projects.title: ResolveIT AI
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered IT Helpdesk
projects.desc: AI helpdesk automation that classifies and resolves support tickets using NLP. Real-time dashboard for ticket monitoring, analytics, and performance tracking.

projects.title: Phishing Simulation Program
projects.subtitle: Cybersecurity Awareness
projects.desc: Designed and delivered cybersecurity awareness training at NPCL. Conducted simulated phishing campaigns to assess user behaviour and close security awareness gaps.

projects.title: Enterprise MDM
projects.subtitle: ManageEngine Implementation
projects.desc: Implemented ManageEngine MDM across enterprise devices. Enforced centralised device policies, encryption, access restrictions, and application management.

projects.title: CyberArk PAM
projects.subtitle: Privileged Access Management
projects.desc: Deployed CyberArk PAM in enterprise environment. Managed privileged account access, enforced least-privilege policies, and integrated with existing IT infrastructure.

projects.title: Facial Recognition Auth
projects.subtitle: AI Passenger Verification
projects.desc: Computer vision system for automated passenger identity verification. Real-time face detection and matching using Python and OpenCV against stored records.

projects.title: AI Placement Platform
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack EdTech
projects.desc: Full-stack web platform for placement preparation. Personalised recommendation system for skill gaps, mock tests, progress tracking, and performance analytics.

projects.title: Threat Detection System
projects.subtitle: SOC Monitoring Platform
projects.desc: Monitoring strategies to detect and respond to enterprise cybersecurity threats. Analysed system logs, identified attack patterns, and optimised incident response workflows.
